---
title: Development
sidebar: development
---

This section covers developer-facing guides for working on DerZug and creating custom widgets.

- [Creating Widgets](creating_widgets.qmd) — how to generate DerZug widgets from callables and tasks
- [Widget Development](widget_development.md) — writing full custom `ZugWidget` subclasses
- [Guidelines](guidelines.md) — coding style, testing conventions, and tooling requirements
